chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 489 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of reference. 18.09.2025 Mr. M. Rashid Arfi, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2020 without any progress and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Even today time is sought for no cogent reason. In view of judgment CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
